articles.title: Gaming Giant Nexon Taps Polygon for NFT Game MapleStory Universe
articles.description: Cute and on-chain: the massive MapleStory franchise will enter Web3 with its own dedicated Supernet on Ethereum scaling network Polygon.

articles.title: Sony's Latest NFT Patent Push Suggests Web3 Path for PlayStation
articles.description: The PlayStation 5 maker is stacking NFT-related patent applications, pointing to a more open future for the gaming giant.

articles.title: Sushi hit with SEC subpoena, seeking $3 million USDT legal defense fund
articles.description: The proposed legal defense fund would cover fees for Sushi's core contributors.

articles.title: Polygon to help develop Immutable zkEVM secured by matic stakers
articles.description: Immutable zkEVM will leverage ZK-Rollup technology for scalable Ethereum smart contracts, and in the future, it will be secured by validators who stake matic tokens.
